creator: Wellcome Library
description: This film shows the second stage of labour, and opens with the head of the first child advancing and gradually distending the perineum. The first child presents in the left occipito anterior position. The second child presents and is delivered in the third vortex position. The placenta is delivered. 3 segments.
subject: Obstetrics
Twins, Monozygotic

title: Labour with uniovular twins
